checks.label: Roadmap can classify the learner into a closed-loop training phase.
Daily sprint type, count, exit rule, and routing bias are explicit.
1500+ mode has same-skill, transfer, mixed, and timed proof buckets.
checks.evidence: sat_adaptive_routing_engine.js builds the four Crucible routing buckets.

checks.label: Wrong answers route into lesson, proof, proof failure, and due review states.
checks.evidence: sat_remediation_engine.js contains proof lifecycle states and review cadence.

checks.label: Mastered status is gated by hard/timed fresh proof, not raw accuracy alone.
checks.evidence: sat_mastery_engine.js tracks hard/timed fresh proof forms.

checks.label: Reviewed question bank has no critical blockers, rejected rows, or topic overload.
Reviewed pool remains academically ready for high-quality SAT practice.
Active study rows are reviewed or content-audit pass.

remaining.reason: Needs real student logs before difficulty and discrimination parameters are statistically defensible.
remaining.nextStep: Collect attempt logs, then fit per-item difficulty/discrimination and compare against current heuristic routing.

remaining.reason: 53 technically valid long RW prompts are suppressed from default study by policy, not quality blockers.
remaining.nextStep: Rewrite or split only if the product wants them in default learner flow.
